mapper.select: SELECT CO_ID, MST_CD, SUB_CD, SUB_NM, SUB_DESC, SUB_ORD_NO, ATTR_CTNT1, ATTR_CTNT2, ATTR_CTNT3, ATTR_CTNT4, ATTR_CTNT5, ATTR_CTNT6, ATTR_CTNT7, ATTR_CTNT8, ATTR_CTNT9, ATTR_CTNT10, ATTR_CTNT11, ATTR_CTNT12, ATTR_CTNT13, ATTR_CTNT14, ATTR_CTNT15, ATTR_CTNT16, ATTR_CTNT17, ATTR_CTNT18, ATTR_CTNT19, ATTR_CTNT20, DFLT_FLG, USE_FLG, CRE_USR_ID, CRE_DT, UPD_USR_ID, UPD_DT FROM COM_SUB_CD WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND MST_CD = #{mstCd} ORDER BY SUB_ORD_NO, SUB_CD

SELECT CO_ID, MST_CD, SUB_CD, SUB_NM, SUB_DESC, SUB_ORD_NO, ATTR_CTNT1, ATTR_CTNT2, ATTR_CTNT3, ATTR_CTNT4, ATTR_CTNT5, ATTR_CTNT6, ATTR_CTNT7, ATTR_CTNT8, ATTR_CTNT9, ATTR_CTNT10, ATTR_CTNT11, ATTR_CTNT12, ATTR_CTNT13, ATTR_CTNT14, ATTR_CTNT15, ATTR_CTNT16, ATTR_CTNT17, ATTR_CTNT18, ATTR_CTNT19, ATTR_CTNT20, DFLT_FLG, USE_FLG, CRE_USR_ID, CRE_DT, UPD_USR_ID, UPD_DT FROM COM_SUB_CD WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND MST_CD = #{mstCd} AND USE_FLG = 'Y' ORDER BY SUB_ORD_NO, SUB_CD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COM_MST_CD ( CO_ID, MST_CD, MST_NM, MST_MDL_NM, MST_DESC, USE_FLG, CRE_USR_ID, CRE_DT, UPD_USR_ID, UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{coId}, #{mstCd}, #{mstNm}, #{mstMdlNm}, #{mstDesc}, COALESCE(#{useFlg}, 'Y'), #{creUsrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{updUsrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update:
UPDATE COM_MST_CD
MST_NM = #{mstNm},
MST_MDL_NM = #{mstMdlNm},
MST_DESC = #{mstDesc},
USE_FLG = #{useFlg},
UPD_USR_ID = #{updUsrId}, UPD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND MST_CD = #{mstCd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COM_SUB_CD ( CO_ID, MST_CD, SUB_CD, SUB_NM, SUB_DESC, SUB_ORD_NO, ATTR_CTNT1, ATTR_CTNT2, ATTR_CTNT3, ATTR_CTNT4, ATTR_CTNT5, ATTR_CTNT6, ATTR_CTNT7, ATTR_CTNT8, ATTR_CTNT9, ATTR_CTNT10, ATTR_CTNT11, ATTR_CTNT12, ATTR_CTNT13, ATTR_CTNT14, ATTR_CTNT15, ATTR_CTNT16, ATTR_CTNT17, ATTR_CTNT18, ATTR_CTNT19, ATTR_CTNT20, DFLT_FLG, USE_FLG, CRE_USR_ID, CRE_DT, UPD_USR_ID, UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{coId}, #{mstCd}, #{subCd}, #{subNm}, #{subDesc}, COALESCE(#{subOrdNo}::INTEGER, 99), #{attrCtnt1}, #{attrCtnt2}, #{attrCtnt3}, #{attrCtnt4}, #{attrCtnt5}, #{attrCtnt6}, #{attrCtnt7}, #{attrCtnt8}, #{attrCtnt9}, #{attrCtnt10}, #{attrCtnt11}, #{attrCtnt12}, #{attrCtnt13}, #{attrCtnt14}, #{attrCtnt15}, #{attrCtnt16}, #{attrCtnt17}, #{attrCtnt18}, #{attrCtnt19}, #{attrCtnt20}, COALESCE(#{dfltFlg}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{useFlg}, 'Y'), #{creUsrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{updUsrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update:
UPDATE COM_SUB_CD
SUB_NM = #{subNm},
SUB_DESC = #{subDesc},
SUB_ORD_NO = #{subOrdNo},
ATTR_CTNT1 = #{attrCtnt1},
ATTR_CTNT2 = #{attrCtnt2},
ATTR_CTNT3 = #{attrCtnt3},
ATTR_CTNT4 = #{attrCtnt4},
ATTR_CTNT5 = #{attrCtnt5},
ATTR_CTNT6 = #{attrCtnt6},
ATTR_CTNT7 = #{attrCtnt7},
ATTR_CTNT8 = #{attrCtnt8},
ATTR_CTNT9 = #{attrCtnt9},
ATTR_CTNT10 = #{attrCtnt10},
ATTR_CTNT11 = #{attrCtnt11},
ATTR_CTNT12 = #{attrCtnt12},
ATTR_CTNT13 = #{attrCtnt13},
ATTR_CTNT14 = #{attrCtnt14},
ATTR_CTNT15 = #{attrCtnt15},
ATTR_CTNT16 = #{attrCtnt16},
ATTR_CTNT17 = #{attrCtnt17},
ATTR_CTNT18 = #{attrCtnt18},
ATTR_CTNT19 = #{attrCtnt19},
ATTR_CTNT20 = #{attrCtnt20},
DFLT_FLG = COALESCE(#{dfltFlg}, 'N'),
USE_FLG = #{useFlg},
UPD_USR_ID = #{updUsrId}, UPD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND MST_CD = #{mstCd} AND SUB_CD = #{subCd}
mapper.select: SELECT CO_ID, SHFT_CD AS SUB_CD, SHFT_NM AS SUB_NM FROM COM_SHFT WHERE 1=1 AND CO_ID = #{coId} AND USE_FLG = 'Y' ORDER BY SHFT_CD ASC
SELECT CO_ID, WRK_GRP_ID AS SUB_CD, WRK_GRP_NM AS SUB_NM FROM COM_WRK_GRP WHERE 1=1 AND CO_ID = #{coId} AND USE_FLG = 'Y' ORDER BY WRK_GRP_ID ASC
SELECT CO_ID, WRK_LOC_ID AS SUB_CD, WRK_LOC_NM AS SUB_NM FROM COM_WRK_LOC WHERE 1=1 AND CO_ID = #{coId} AND USE_FLG = 'Y' ORDER BY WRK_LOC_ID ASC
SELECT NTN_CD AS SUB_CD, NTN_NM AS SUB_NM, dflt_flg FROM COM_NTN WHERE 1=1 AND USE_FLG = 'Y' ORDER BY NTN_CD ASC
SELECT ETHNIC_ID AS SUB_CD, ETHNIC_NM AS SUB_NM, dflt_flg FROM COM_ETHNIC WHERE 1=1 AND USE_FLG = 'Y' ORDER BY ETHNIC_ID ASC

WITH RECURSIVE org_descendants AS ( -- For each organization, find all its descendant organizations (including itself) SELECT root.co_id, root.orz_id AS root_orz_id, root.orz_id AS descendant_orz_id FROM adm_orz root WHERE root.use_flg = 'Y' AND root.org_sts_flg = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT od.co_id, od.root_orz_id, child.orz_id AS descendant_orz_id FROM org_descendants od INNER JOIN adm_orz child ON child.co_id = od.co_id AND child.prnt_orz_id = od.descendant_orz_id WHERE child.use_flg = 'Y' AND child.org_sts_flg = 'Y' ), v_count_emp AS ( -- Count employees for each organization including all child organizations SELECT od.root_orz_id AS orz_id, od.co_id, COUNT(DISTINCT e.empe_id) AS num_of_emp FROM org_descendants od LEFT JOIN hrm_empe e ON e.co_id = od.co_id AND e.org_id = od.descendant_orz_id AND e.use_flg = 'Y' GROUP BY od.root_orz_id, od.co_id ), org_hierarchy AS ( -- Base case: root organizations (where prnt_orz_id is NULL) SELECT o.co_id, o.orz_id, o.prnt_orz_id, o.orz_cd, o.orz_nm, o.orz_end_dt, 1 AS lvl, ARRAY[o.orz_id]::varchar[] AS path, '/' || COALESCE(TO_CHAR(o.orz_end_dt, 'YYYYMMDD'), '99999999') AS end_date_path FROM adm_orz o WHERE o.use_flg = 'Y' AND o.org_sts_flg = 'Y' AND o.co_id = #{coId} AND o.prnt_orz_id IS NULL
UNION ALL
-- Recursive case: child organizations SELECT o.co_id, o.orz_id, o.prnt_orz_id, o.orz_cd, o.orz_nm, o.orz_end_dt, oh.lvl + 1 AS lvl, oh.path || o.orz_id AS path, oh.end_date_path || '/' || COALESCE(TO_CHAR(o.orz_end_dt, 'YYYYMMDD'), '99999999') AS end_date_path FROM adm_orz o INNER JOIN org_hierarchy oh ON o.co_id = oh.co_id AND o.prnt_orz_id = oh.orz_id WHERE o.use_flg = 'Y' AND o.org_sts_flg = 'Y' ) SELECT sub_cd, sub_nm, co_id, lvl AS attr_ctnt1, end_date AS attr_ctnt2, text2 AS attr_ctnt3 FROM ( SELECT a.orz_id AS sub_cd, REPEAT(' ', (a.lvl - 1) * 2) || '└ ' || a.orz_nm AS sub_nm, REPEAT(' ', (a.lvl - 1) * 2) || '└ ' || a.orz_nm || ' (' || COALESCE(v.num_of_emp, 0) || ')' AS text2, a.co_id AS co_id, a.lvl AS lvl, REGEXP_REPLACE(a.end_date_path, '[^0-9A-Za-z]', '', 'g') AS end_date, a.path AS sort_path, a.orz_cd AS sort_cd FROM org_hierarchy a INNER JOIN v_count_emp v ON a.co_id = v.co_id AND a.orz_id = v.orz_id ) subq WHERE COALESCE(SUBSTRING(end_date FROM GREATEST(1, LENGTH(end_date) - 7)), '99999999') >= TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY co_id, sort_path, sort_cd
SELECT city_id AS SUB_CD, city_nm AS SUB_NM FROM COM_CITY WHERE 1=1 AND USE_FLG = 'Y' ORDER BY city_id ASC
SELECT district_id AS SUB_CD, district_nm AS SUB_NM, city_id as MST_CD FROM COM_DISTRICT WHERE 1=1 AND USE_FLG = 'Y' ORDER BY district_id ASC
SELECT religion_id AS SUB_CD, religion_nm AS SUB_NM, dflt_flg FROM COM_RELIGION WHERE 1=1 AND USE_FLG = 'Y' ORDER BY religion_id ASC

SELECT CO_ID, ASE_TP_CD AS SUB_CD, ASE_TP_NM AS SUB_NM, CO_PAY_RT AS ATTR_CTNT1, INSUR_PAY_RT AS ATTR_CTNT2, CALC_ANUL_LVE_FLG AS ATTR_CTNT3 FROM COM_ASE_TP WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND USE_FLG = 'Y' ORDER BY ASE_TP_CD
SELECT bank_cd AS SUB_CD, bank_shrt_nm || ' - ' || bank_lcl_nm AS SUB_NM, dflt_flg FROM COM_BANK WHERE 1=1 AND USE_FLG = 'Y' ORDER BY bank_cd ASC
SELECT brnc_cd AS SUB_CD, brnc_nm AS SUB_NM, bank_cd AS ATTR_CTNT1, dflt_flg FROM COM_BANK_BRNC WHERE 1=1 AND USE_FLG = 'Y' ORDER BY brnc_cd ASC
SELECT si_ofc_id AS SUB_CD, si_ofc_nm AS SUB_NM, si_ofc_rmk AS SUB_DESC, dflt_flg FROM COM_SI_OFC WHERE 1=1 AND USE_FLG = 'Y' ORDER BY si_ofc_id ASC
SELECT hospital_id AS SUB_CD, hospital_nm AS SUB_NM, hospital_rmk AS SUB_DESC FROM COM_HOSPITAL WHERE 1=1 AND USE_FLG = 'Y' ORDER BY hospital_id ASC
SELECT TML_ID AS SUB_CD, TML_NM AS SUB_NM FROM COM_TML_INFO WHERE 1=1 AND CO_ID = #{coId} AND USE_FLG = 'Y' ORDER BY TML_ID ASC
SELECT VEHICLE_CD AS SUB_CD, VEHICLE_NM AS SUB_NM FROM COM_VEHICLE WHERE 1=1 AND CO_ID = #{coId} AND USE_FLG = 'Y' ORDER BY VEHICLE_CD ASC
